title: MineSweeper New
description: Minesweeper is a classic addictive puzzle game with different difficulty levels and a nice design! Play the game with your friends and see who wins!
instructions: The numbers in the cells show the number of mines hidden in the eight adjacent cells If there are empty cells near an open cell they will open automatically Left-click to open the cell Long press left-click to mark the bomb
tags: free html5 games for your website
